label: 2026-04-18-with-bramble
description: April 18 canonical anti-air line: open on Sunroot to finance the board, buy one Bramble Spear for each flying lane (lane 1 and lane 3), and spend the rest of the run on grounded coverage plus a late Frost Fern / center support line. Thornwing stays confined to lanes 1 and 3, so those two Brambles should carry every airborne event while Thorn Vines and the control/economy pieces handle the ground rush.

placements.note: Open in the center lane. The first beetle and shard take a long time to reach c0, so Sunroot both funds the anti-air purchases and physically stalls the early lane-2 ground pressure.
Dedicated lane-1 anti-air placed far forward. This lane only hosts Thornwings, so pushing the Bramble to col 5 cuts projectile travel time without exposing it to ground pressure.
Lane 3 needs an earlier shot path than a c5 Spear can give at 12s. Planting at col 2 keeps the projectile origin left of the opening Thornwing so the first wave can still be intercepted.
Center-lane damage arrives behind the Sunroot wall once both anti-air lanes are covered.
Top-lane coverage before the late shard pressure compounds.
Bottom-lane ground cover after the top-lane shard answer is online.
Late lane-2 control anchor near the sniper attack point and ram path.
Second top-lane Thorn for the later shard and ram pressure.
Second bottom-lane Thorn so the late grounded traffic does not erase the economy lane.
Second center attacker to help the chilled lane survive the wave-3 and wave-4 ground stack.
Late center piercing support for the double-ram/double-sniper endgame.
